_comment: ROB-309 — US narrow dimension-reports ingest payload (ROB-306 contract) pinned to market='us'. Per-dimension analyst reports for the SAME US stage run. confidence is capped by freshness on ingest. {{...}} placeholders substituted by the round-trip smoke at runtime.

dimension_reports.report_text: S&P 500 risk-on: breadth net-positive, megacap leadership intact, VIX subdued. Constructive regime for selective longs.
Mixed earnings reads; no single dominant catalyst. AAPL services mildly above consensus, MSFT cloud guide reiterated.
key_findings: AAPL services revenue mildly above consensus
